metadata.text:
<document_metadata>
sourceDocument: frontend/src/app/components/dashboard/dashboard.component.html
published: 4/26/2026, 11:03:36 PM
</document_metadata>

<style>
  .dash-container {
    background-image: url('/assets/images/pizzeria-app-core.jpg');
    background-size: cover;
    background-position: center;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: 40px 20px;
    filter: brightness(1.1);
  }
  .main-panel {
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85);
    backdrop-filter: blur(15px);
    border-radius: 20px;
    color: #fff8e7;
    padding: 30px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3);
  }
  .main-panel h2 {
    color: #d4af37;
  }
  .table-container {
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
    border-radius: 15px;
    padding: 20px;
    margin-top: 20px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.2);
  }
  .table-container th {
    color: #d4af37 !important;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }
  .table-container td {
    color: #fff8e7 !important;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 248, 231, 0.1);
  }
  .table-container tr:hover td {
    background: rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.05);
  }
</style>
